race.comment: SWEET JUSTICE (5) returns from a 27-week spell and has switched from the Hayes stable to Liam Ruddy at Scone. Came from last of 14 on the bend to finish third when resuming over 1200m at Ballarat last prep. Wins this if she finds that form. MAGURTZ (3) was run off his legs and couldn't get involved first-up over 1000m at Muswellbrook. Lightly raced three-year-old who won his maiden over a similar trip to this last prep. Draws the fence and can improve sharply. FARNCIFUL (6) opened this prep with three strong runs then had no luck at Gosford most recently. On trial beyond 1000m but is finding the line with gusto so it should suit. SIRLEAF (1) passed a few in the straight but was never a threat first-up over 1100m at Scone. Needs this trip and from a favourable draw gets all the favours. EDDIE'S CHARM (9) is fitter for two runs back from a spell and makes plenty of each-way appeal down on 55kgs.
